zh.lifeSummary: 當Juliana de Pembridge於1349年出生在英國德比夏爾哈登 霍爾時，她的父親Sir Robert de Pembridge of Tong, Knight39歲，母親Juliana la Zouche35歲。她於1361年與Richard de Vernon I在英國爾哈頓 在 瓦維頓結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1410年7月9日在她的家鄉享年61歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Juliana de Pembridge于1349年出生在英国德比夏爾哈登 霍爾时，她的父亲Sir Robert de Pembridge of Tong, Knight39岁，母亲Juliana la Zouche35岁。她于1361年与Richard de Vernon I在英国爾哈頓 在 瓦維頓结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1410年7月9日在她的家乡享年61岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Pembridge
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Pembridge (Herefs), which is recorded as Penebrug(g)e from the 11th to 14th centuries. The place-name derives from an Old English personal name * Pena + Old English brycg ‘bridge’. In some cases the surname may be from Pen Bridge in Shipley (Sussex), which derives from an uncertain first element + Old English brycg.

variants.name: Pember
meanings: English: perhaps a variant of Pamber, a habitational name from a place in Hampshire named Pamber, from Old English penn ‘fold, enclosure’ + beorg ‘hill’.

nameMeanings.name: Juliana
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: feminine form of Julianus ( see Julian ), which was revived in England in the 18th century and has been used occasionally ever since.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Juliana de Pembridge was born in 1349, in Haddon Hall, Derbyshire, England, her father, Sir Robert de Pembridge of Tong, Knight, was 39 and her mother, Juliana la Zouche, was 35. She married Richard de Vernon I in 1361, in Hatton in Waverton, Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 9 July 1410, in her hometown, at the age of 61.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Juliana de Pembridge est née en 1349, à Haddon Hall, Derbyshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Robert de Pembridge of Tong, Knight, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Juliana la Zouche, avait 35 ans. Elle a épousé Richard de Vernon I en 1361, à Hatton in Waverton, Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 9 juillet 1410, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 61 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Juliana de Pembridge 1349 in Haddon Hall, Derbyshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Robert de Pembridge of Tong, Knight 39 und ihre Mutter Juliana la Zouche 35. Sie hat 1361 in Hatton in Waverton, Cheshire, England Richard de Vernon I geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 9. Juli 1410 im Alter von 61 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Juliana de Pembridge è nata il nel 1349 nel Haddon Hall, Derbyshire, England, sua padre, Sir Robert de Pembridge of Tong, Knight, aveva 39 anni e sua madre, Juliana la Zouche, aveva 35 anni. Lei sposato Richard de Vernon I nel 1361, nel Hatton in Waverton, Cheshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 9 luglio 1410, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 61 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Juliana de Pembridgeが1349年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアハッドオン ハルで生まれた時，父Sir Robert de Pembridge of Tong, Knightは39歳，母Juliana la Zoucheは35歳であった。1361年にイギリスチェシュアイアハットオン イン ワバートンでRichard de Vernon Iと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1410年7月9日に故郷で61歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Juliana de Pembridge(이)가 1349년 영국 더비실르 하던 홀에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Robert de Pembridge of Tong, Knight(은)는 39세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Juliana la Zouche(은)는 35세였다. 그녀는 1361년 영국 체실르 해턴 인 와버턴에서 Richard de Vernon I(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1410년 7월 9일 그녀의 고향에서 61세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Juliana de Pembridge nasceu em 1349, em Haddon Hall, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Robert de Pembridge of Tong, Knight, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Juliana la Zouche, tinha 35 anos. Ela casou-se com Richard de Vernon I em 1361, em Hatton in Waverton, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 9 de julho de 1410, em sua cidade natal, com 61 anos.

ro.Bakewell Circuit, Derbyshire, England, U: Bakewell Circuit, Derbyshire, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Juliana de Pembridge родилась в 1349 г. в местности хаддон холл, дирбишир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Robert de Pembridge of Tong, Knight было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Juliana la Zouche, 35. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard de Vernon I в 1361 г. в местности хаттон ин вавиртон, чешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 9 июля 1410 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 61 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Juliana de Pembridge nació en 1349, en Haddon Hall, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Robert de Pembridge of Tong, Knight, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Juliana la Zouche, tenía 35 años. Se casó con Richard de Vernon I en 1361, en Hatton in Waverton, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 9 de julio de 1410, en su pueblo, a la edad de 61 años.
